top_signals.title: Nuclear Company Deep Fission Files for $156 Million IPO
top_signals.summary: Deep Fission Inc. is seeking to raise up to $156 million in a US initial public offering, the latest nuclear startup to go that route as artificial intelligence data centers stoke demand for electricity.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
